payload.title: Recognize governed locus federation as emerging Narada concept cluster
payload.summary: Operator and architect identified a larger adjacent concept cluster behind recent proposals: governed continuity across evolving loci. Site lifecycle transformations, Site pub/sub, provenance lineage, authority-clone routing, and Plural Embodiment/Singular Authority appear to be facets of a broader Narada doctrine that might be called Governed Locus Federation or Governed Federated Self-Reinstantiation.
evidence: Authority routing: commands may originate from many embodiments, but governed mutation resolves to one locus.
Locus lifecycle: Sites can be born, cloned, split, absorbed, migrated, archived, and re-instantiated.
Lineage graph: Site transformations need durable provenance edges with authority and evidence semantics.
Federated awareness: Sites publish and subscribe to typed signals without automatic authority transfer.
Governed admission: incoming signals, tools, knowledge, templates, and proposals enter as inert candidates before promotion.
Operational self-reproduction: Narada should be able to create more Narada loci while preserving doctrine, authority, and trace.
proposal: Open a doctrine/design investigation into the parent concept above Site lifecycle, pub/sub, provenance, and plural embodiment: possible names include Governed Locus Federation or Governed Federated Self-Reinstantiation.

De-arbitrarize the concept boundary: distinguish embodiment topology, authority routing, locus lifecycle, lineage/provenance, pub/sub influence, governed admission, authority migration, and re-instantiable memory.
Decide whether this should become Narada doctrine, a Site architecture arc, a substrate package, or a set of coordinated but separate features.

Use existing proposals as originating cases: two-clone authority routing, Site lifecycle transformations, Site pub/sub, Site provenance lineage, and thoughts concept Plural Embodiment/Singular Authority.
Avoid premature implementation until the parent concept clarifies which structures are forced, which are policy, and which are merely adjacent.
payload.recommendation: Promote to a PDA/CIPDA doctrine/design chapter or arc before product machinery. This seems like an organizing concept for Narada as a self-extending network of governed loci.

promotion.note: Envelope archived; no target-zone mutation was performed.
